name: posthorn
desc: Self-hosted email gateway between your apps and a transactional mail provider (Postmark, Resend, Mailgun, AWS SES, or outbound-SMTP). Three ingress shapes (HTT…
descFull: Self-hosted email gateway between your apps and a transactional mail provider (Postmark, Resend, Mailgun, AWS SES, or outbound-SMTP). Three ingress shapes (HTTP form, HTTP API, SMTP). One Docker container, one TOML config.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: Posthorn, self-hosted mail gateway
